apiProperty.description: The visual style of the button. Determines background color, text color, and border treatment.

examples.title: High-emphasis — the main action on the surface

apiProperty.description: When true, the button is non-interactive. The cursor changes to not-allowed, and the button is visually dimmed to 40% opacity.
When true, the label is replaced with a spinner and the button is non-interactive. The button retains its dimensions to prevent layout shift.
The size of the button. Affects padding, font size, icon size, and minimum target area.

apiEvent.description: Fires when the button is activated via mouse click, touch tap, Enter key, or Space key. Does not fire when the button is disabled or loading.
Fires when the button receives focus.
Fires when the button loses focus.

apiSlot.description: The primary content slot. Accepts text, icons, or a combination of both. When both an icon and text are provided, the icon appears before the text by default.
apiSlot.acceptedContent: Text, Icon, or a combination. Avoid placing interactive elements inside the button.

apiCssCustomProperty.description: The background color of the button container.
The color of the label text.
The border radius of the button container.
The left and right padding inside the button container.

apiCssPart.description: The root container element of the button. Use for overriding background, border, and padding from outside the shadow DOM.
The text label element. Use for overriding font styles from outside the shadow DOM.
The icon wrapper element. Use for adjusting icon size or color from outside the shadow DOM.

apiDataAttribute.description: Reflects the current variant. Useful for parent-level conditional styling.
Present when the button is in a loading state. Useful for CSS selectors that target loading buttons.

apiMethod.description: Programmatically moves focus to the button element. Useful after closing a modal or completing a flow that should return focus to the triggering button.
apiMethod.parameters: (options?: FocusOptions) — optional FocusOptions object with `preventScroll` boolean.

apiMethod.description: Programmatically triggers the button's click handler. Does not fire if the button is disabled or loading.

properties.description: The visual style of the button.
When true, the button is non-interactive.

events.description: Fires when the button is activated.

cssCustomProperties.description: The background color of the button container.

cssParts.description: The root container element of the button.

methods.description: Programmatically moves focus to the button element.
